name: Tarn-et-Garonne (France)
description: A red field bearing several gold charges: a lion rampant in the upper hoist, an Occitan cross in the lower hoist, a lion passant in the lower fly, and in the upper fly a quartered panel with white lions on blue and gold wheat sheaves.
history: The composite arms gather the Occitan cross and the lions and garbs of the medieval territories that were combined to form the department in 1808.

features.role: quartered panel of lions and wheat sheaves in upper fly
